packageRules.description: Automerge low-risk GitHub Actions bumps. Actions are SHA-pinned and the validate workflow gates every PR; minor/patch/digest carry no behavior change. Majors stay manual.
Automerge minor/patch bumps of the validator's only runtime libs (jsonschema, PyYAML in requirements.txt). Majors stay manual.

NEVER touch the catalog profiles. A profile's pinned validated_image (and applies_to.digests) is derivation EVIDENCE — the exact artifact the minimum was validated against — not a dependency to keep fresh. Digest freshness is handled deliberately by scripts/check_staleness.py + re-derivation on the BPF runner, never by a dep-bumper. Defensive fence: keep catalog/** off-limits to every manager.
